tools.name: upscale_image
tools.description: Super-resolution using Real-ESRGAN on NVIDIA L4 GPU. 5 models for different content types. Default: 2x general upscale. ($0.20 / 2 GCX)

tools.name: enrich_metadata
tools.description: AI-powered artwork analysis. Two tiers: 'standard' (1 GCX) = SEO-optimized title, description, keywords, alt_text via Nova-Lite. 'premium' (2 GCX, default) = full 8-section Golden Codex museum-grade analysis via Nova/Gemini 2.5 Pro. Optionally customize metadata fields and add a Soul Whisper persona

tools.name: infuse_metadata
tools.description: Embed metadata into image via ExifTool. Two modes: 'standard' (XMP/IPTC only — title, description, keywords, copyright) or 'full_gcx' (default — full Golden Codex XMP-gc namespace + IPTC + C2PA + soulmark + hash registration). ($0.10 / 1 GCX)

tools.name: register_hash
tools.description: Register 256-bit perceptual hash with LSH band indexing for strip-proof provenance. ($0.10 / 1 GCX)

tools.name: verify_provenance
tools.description: Strip-proof provenance verification via Aegis hash index. FREE - no payment required. (FREE)

tools.name: search_artworks
tools.description: Search 53K+ museum artworks from Alexandria Aeternum (MET, Chicago, NGA, Rijksmuseum, Smithsonian, Cleveland, Paris). FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: get_artwork
tools.description: Get Human_Standard metadata (500-1200 tokens) + signed image URL for a museum artwork. ($0.10 / 1 GCX)

tools.name: get_artwork_oracle
tools.description: Get Hybrid_Premium 111-field NEST analysis (2K-6K tokens) + image. Deep AI visual analysis with color palette, composition, symbolism, emotional mapping. ($0.20 / 2 GCX)

tools.name: batch_download
tools.description: Bulk download metadata + images from Alexandria Aeternum (min 100 artworks). ($5.00 / 50 GCX)

tools.name: compliance_manifest
tools.description: Get AB 2013 (California) + EU AI Act Article 53 compliance manifests for dataset usage. FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: resize_image
tools.description: Resize an image to target dimensions. Supports fit modes: 'cover' (crop to fill), 'contain' (fit within, letterbox), 'stretch' (exact size). Useful for preparing images for specific platforms, thumbnails, or social media. FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: extract_palette
tools.description: Extract dominant color palette from an image. Returns hex/RGB/HSL colors with percentages, CSS names, and complementary colors. Great for design systems, mood boards, and color matching. FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: remove_background
tools.description: Remove image background using AI (U2-Net). Returns RGBA PNG/WebP with transparent background. Perfect for product photos, portraits, and design assets. FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: mockup_image
tools.description: Place your design onto product mockups (t-shirt, poster, canvas, phone case, mug, tote bag). Instant product visualization for e-commerce and print-on-demand. FREE. ($0.10 / 1 GCX)

tools.name: convert_color_profile
tools.description: Convert between sRGB and CMYK color profiles. Essential for print production. CMYK output as TIFF with embedded DPI. FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: print_ready
tools.description: Prepare images for professional printing with DPI, bleed margins, crop marks. Supports A4, A3, Letter, poster (24x36), custom sizes. Output as TIFF or PDF. FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: vectorize_image
tools.description: Convert raster images to SVG vector format. Supports color and binary modes with precision controls. Returns raw SVG XML string. FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: watermark_embed
tools.description: Embed invisible DCT-domain watermark into an image. Encodes a text payload into luminance channel frequency coefficients. Survives light compression. FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: watermark_detect
tools.description: Detect and extract invisible DCT watermark from an image. Returns the embedded text payload if found. FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: save_asset
tools.description: Save an image or data to your personal wallet storage. 100MB free per wallet, 500 assets max. ($0.10 / 1 GCX)

tools.name: get_asset
tools.description: Retrieve a stored asset from your wallet storage by key. FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: list_assets
tools.description: List all assets in your wallet storage with sizes and metadata. FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: delete_asset
tools.description: Delete an asset from your wallet storage. FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: register_wallet
tools.description: Register your wallet to get 10 FREE GCX credits ($1 value). New wallets only — enough to try upscale + enrich. Purchase more via GCX packs. FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: check_balance
tools.description: Check your GCX credit balance, loyalty rewards, and volume tier. FREE. (FREE)

tools.name: search_tools
tools.description: Discover available tools by category or price without loading all schemas. Start here to save tokens. (FREE)

tools.name: get_tool_schema
tools.description: Get the full JSON Schema and usage examples for a specific tool. Use after search_tools to load only what you need. (FREE)
